panels.title: Active Players
panels.description: Players who set a score within the dashboard time range

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT s.user_id) AS "Active Players" FROM scores s WHERE s.active = true AND s.time_set IS NOT NULL AND $__timeFilter(s.time_set);
SELECT COUNT(*) AS "Total Users" FROM users WHERE active = true;
SELECT COUNT(*) AS "Ranked Maps" FROM map_difficulties WHERE active = true AND status = 'ranked';
SELECT COUNT(*) AS "Total Scores" FROM scores WHERE active = true;
SELECT date_trunc('day', time_set) AS time, COUNT(*) AS "Scores" FROM scores WHERE active = true AND time_set IS NOT NULL AND $__timeFilter(time_set) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;
SELECT date_trunc('day', created_at) AS time, COUNT(*) AS "New Users" FROM users WHERE $__timeFilter(created_at) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;

SELECT c.name AS "Category", COUNT(s.id) AS "Scores" FROM scores s JOIN map_difficulties md ON s.map_difficulty_id = md.id JOIN categories c ON md.category_id = c.id WHERE s.active = true GROUP BY c.name ORDER BY "Scores" DESC;
SELECT pg_database_size(current_database()) AS "DB Size";
SELECT relname AS "Table", pg_size_pretty(pg_relation_size(relid)) AS "Size", n_live_tup AS "Rows" FROM pg_stat_user_tables ORDER BY pg_relation_size(relid) DESC LIMIT 10;
SELECT ROUND(blks_hit::numeric / NULLIF(blks_hit + blks_read, 0), 4) AS "Cache Hit Ratio" FROM pg_stat_database WHERE datname = current_database();
SELECT COUNT(*) AS "Active Connections" FROM pg_stat_activity WHERE state = 'active';
SELECT pid, NOW() - query_start AS duration, LEFT(query, 100) AS query FROM pg_stat_activity WHERE state = 'active' AND query_start < NOW() - INTERVAL '5 seconds' ORDER BY query_start LIMIT 5;

panels.title: Most Replayed Maps
panels.description: Maps with the most total score submissions (active + superseded), indicating grind/replay activity

targets.rawSql: SELECT m.song_name || ' [' || md.difficulty || ']' AS "Map", c.name AS "Category", COUNT(*) AS "Total Submissions", COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE s.active = true) AS "Active", COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE s.active = false) AS "Superseded", COUNT(DISTINCT s.user_id) AS "Unique Players", ROUND(COUNT(*)::numeric / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT s.user_id), 0), 1) AS "Avg Plays/Player" FROM scores s JOIN map_difficulties md ON s.map_difficulty_id = md.id JOIN maps m ON md.map_id = m.id JOIN categories c ON md.category_id = c.id GROUP BY m.song_name, md.difficulty, c.name ORDER BY "Total Submissions" DESC LIMIT 15;

panels.title: Biggest Score Improvers (time range)
panels.description: Players who superseded the most of their own scores - grinding for accuracy

targets.rawSql: SELECT u.name AS "Player", COUNT(*) AS "Scores Improved", ROUND(AVG(new_s.ap - old_s.ap), 2) AS "Avg AP Gain", ROUND(MAX(new_s.ap - old_s.ap), 2) AS "Best AP Gain" FROM scores new_s JOIN scores old_s ON new_s.supersedes_id = old_s.id JOIN users u ON new_s.user_id = u.id WHERE new_s.active = true AND new_s.supersedes_id IS NOT NULL AND $__timeFilter(new_s.created_at) GROUP BY u.name HAVING COUNT(*) >= 2 ORDER BY "Scores Improved" DESC LIMIT 15;
SELECT COALESCE(u.country, 'Unknown') AS "Country", COUNT(*) AS "Players" FROM users u WHERE u.active = true AND u.country IS NOT NULL GROUP BY u.country ORDER BY "Players" DESC LIMIT 20;

panels.title: Accuracy Distribution
panels.description: How many active scores fall into each accuracy bucket

targets.rawSql: WITH acc AS (SELECT s.score::numeric / NULLIF(md.max_score, 0) AS accuracy FROM scores s JOIN map_difficulties md ON s.map_difficulty_id = md.id WHERE s.active = true AND md.max_score > 0) SELECT CASE WHEN accuracy < 0.80 THEN '<80%' WHEN accuracy < 0.85 THEN '80-85%' WHEN accuracy < 0.90 THEN '85-90%' WHEN accuracy < 0.93 THEN '90-93%' WHEN accuracy < 0.95 THEN '93-95%' WHEN accuracy < 0.97 THEN '95-97%' WHEN accuracy < 0.99 THEN '97-99%' ELSE '99%+' END AS "Accuracy Range", COUNT(*) AS "Scores" FROM acc GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY MIN(accuracy);

panels.title: Hardest Maps (lowest avg accuracy)
panels.description: Ranked maps where players struggle the most

targets.rawSql: SELECT m.song_name || ' [' || md.difficulty || ']' AS "Map", c.name AS "Category", mdc.complexity AS "Complexity", COUNT(s.id) AS "Plays", ROUND(AVG(s.score::numeric / NULLIF(md.max_score, 0)) * 100, 2) AS "Avg Acc %", ROUND(MAX(s.score::numeric / NULLIF(md.max_score, 0)) * 100, 2) AS "Best Acc %" FROM scores s JOIN map_difficulties md ON s.map_difficulty_id = md.id JOIN maps m ON md.map_id = m.id JOIN categories c ON md.category_id = c.id LEFT JOIN map_difficulty_complexities mdc ON mdc.map_difficulty_id = md.id AND mdc.active = true WHERE s.active = true AND md.status = 'ranked' AND md.max_score > 0 GROUP BY m.song_name, md.difficulty, c.name, mdc.complexity HAVING COUNT(s.id) >= 3 ORDER BY AVG(s.score::numeric / md.max_score) ASC LIMIT 15;

SELECT u.name AS "Player", m.song_name || ' [' || md.difficulty || ']' AS "Map", c.name AS "Category", ROUND(s.ap, 2) AS "AP", ROUND(s.score::numeric / NULLIF(md.max_score, 0) * 100, 2) AS "Acc %", s.time_set AS "When" FROM scores s JOIN users u ON s.user_id = u.id JOIN map_difficulties md ON s.map_difficulty_id = md.id JOIN maps m ON md.map_id = m.id JOIN categories c ON md.category_id = c.id WHERE s.active = true AND md.max_score > 0 ORDER BY s.ap DESC LIMIT 15;

panels.title: Score Velocity (scores/hour over time)
panels.description: Hourly score submission rate - shows peak play times

targets.rawSql: SELECT date_trunc('hour', time_set) AS time, COUNT(*) AS "Scores/Hour" FROM scores WHERE active = true AND time_set IS NOT NULL AND $__timeFilter(time_set) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;

SELECT u.name AS "Player", u.country AS "Country", ROUND(u.total_xp, 0) AS "Total XP", lt.level AS "Level", lt.title AS "Title" FROM users u LEFT JOIN LATERAL (SELECT level, title FROM level_thresholds WHERE xp_required <= u.total_xp ORDER BY level DESC LIMIT 1) lt ON true WHERE u.active = true AND u.total_xp > 0 ORDER BY u.total_xp DESC LIMIT 15;

panels.title: Versioning Churn (supersedes/day)
panels.description: Rate of INSERT-ONLY versioning across tables - spikes indicate reweights or mass recalcs

targets.rawSql: SELECT date_trunc('day', created_at) AS time, COUNT(*) AS "Score Versions" FROM scores WHERE active = false AND supersedes_id IS NOT NULL AND $__timeFilter(created_at) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;

SELECT date_trunc('day', created_at) AS time, COUNT(*) AS "Stat Versions" FROM user_category_statistics WHERE active = false AND supersedes_id IS NOT NULL AND $__timeFilter(created_at) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;

panels.title: Most Competitive Maps (tightest AP spread)
panels.description: Maps where the gap between best and worst score is smallest - everyone is close

targets.rawSql: SELECT m.song_name || ' [' || md.difficulty || ']' AS "Map", c.name AS "Category", COUNT(s.id) AS "Players", ROUND(MAX(s.ap) - MIN(s.ap), 2) AS "AP Spread", ROUND(AVG(s.ap), 2) AS "Avg AP", ROUND(STDDEV(s.ap), 2) AS "Std Dev" FROM scores s JOIN map_difficulties md ON s.map_difficulty_id = md.id JOIN maps m ON md.map_id = m.id JOIN categories c ON md.category_id = c.id WHERE s.active = true AND md.status = 'ranked' GROUP BY m.song_name, md.difficulty, c.name HAVING COUNT(s.id) >= 5 ORDER BY STDDEV(s.ap) ASC LIMIT 15;

panels.title: One-and-Done vs Grinders
panels.description: Players grouped by how many maps they've replayed (superseded their own score on)

targets.rawSql: WITH player_replays AS (SELECT user_id, COUNT(DISTINCT map_difficulty_id) AS maps_replayed FROM scores WHERE supersedes_id IS NOT NULL AND active = true GROUP BY user_id) SELECT CASE WHEN maps_replayed = 0 THEN '0 replays' WHEN maps_replayed BETWEEN 1 AND 2 THEN '1-2' WHEN maps_replayed BETWEEN 3 AND 5 THEN '3-5' WHEN maps_replayed BETWEEN 6 AND 10 THEN '6-10' WHEN maps_replayed BETWEEN 11 AND 25 THEN '11-25' ELSE '25+' END AS "Maps Replayed", COUNT(*) AS "Players" FROM player_replays GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY MIN(maps_replayed);
